title: hieracium acutellum
intro: Hieracium acutellum, also known as the sharp-pointed hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium acutellum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
